features.notes: package.ts registers Sentence Similarity Search viewer, sentenceSearch top-menu, Similar/Distance widgets; viewer class lives in utils/sentence-similarity-viewer.ts; stemming-tools provides getClosest/getMarkedString/setStemmingCash; stemming-ui provides the Distance edit modal.

package.ts implements Sentence Embeddings preprocessor, Compute Text Embeddings dialog, getEmbeddings (docker fetchProxy), and Radial Coloring; minilm-feature-worker.ts is the in-browser fallback embedding extractor; constants.ts supplies TINY/POLAR_FREQ used by Radial Coloring.

Stem Column preprocessing function in package.ts wraps stemmColumn from stemming-tools.ts; stemming-ui.ts hosts the context/distance edit panels; metrics.ts and constants.ts provide the metric definitions and stop-word/separator constants.
Implementation lives entirely in scripts/ (sentiment-analysis.py, vader-sentiment-analysis.py, sentiment.R) which are outside files.src; no TS wrappers.
Implementation is the Python script scripts/extractive-summarizer-file.py (not in files.src); nlp-panels.ts tests the 'Summary' file panel that the script powers.
Implementation is in scripts/language-detection.py and scripts/readability-score-file.py (outside files.src); nlp-panels.ts exercises the 'Text Statistics' file panel.

Translation widget (translationPanel) and AWS Translate init (initAWS) are in package.ts; code2lang.json/lang2code.json provide the supported-language code mappings; depends at runtime on NLP:TextExtractor and NLP:LanguageDetector scripts.
Implementation is the Python script scripts/text-extractor.py (outside files.src); no TS wrapper.
